description: preloaded dru module for TLD policy control and availability checking.
activation_scope: apply domain semantics only when module domain is explicitly invoked or activated
constraints: domain check expands a base name across the active tld set
tld mutation normalizes suffixes to dotted form
tld state is canonicalized to dotted suffix form without duplicates
domain owns tld policy and availability checking only
no seeded historical or personal data in module bootstrap

command_rows.command_semantic: activate domain tld policy control and availability checking within dru.
check whether, for each configured TLD, {{ argument }}.{{ tld }} is available for registration
add {{ argument }} to the list of TLD's that are checked when the check subcommand is executed
output all TLD's checked by domain check
remove {{ argument }} from the list of checked TLD's
